description: No direct Rich Console instantiation in CLI handlers — use get_console()
fix: Import get_console() from modules.backend.cli.report instead of instantiating Console directly

description: No direct Rich Table instantiation in CLI handlers — use build_table() or summary_table()
fix: Import build_table() or summary_table() from modules.backend.cli.report instead of instantiating Table directly

description: No direct Rich Panel instantiation in CLI handlers — use shared panel primitives
fix: Import output_panel(), thinking_panel(), primary_panel(), info_panel(), or status_panel() from modules.backend.cli.report

description: No direct box.Box definitions in CLI handlers — use DOTTED_ROWS from report.py
fix: Import DOTTED_ROWS or other box styles from modules.backend.cli.report

description: No inline Rich markup color definitions — use styled_status(), severity_color(), or status_color()
fix: Use styled_status(), severity_color(), or status_color() from modules.backend.cli.report for consistent color conventions

description: Display primitives must be keyword-only where possible (P14)
fix: Use keyword-only arguments (after *) for display primitives to ensure readable call sites per P14
